summary: Live Game state 'DELAYED' Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON

steps.action: WHEN a live game has any of the following statusCode values: IV,IP,IY,IE,IA,IO,IZ
steps.result: THEN 'DELAYED' is not displayed in the match-up header of the game tile
